name: Crew
intro: Marshal, your Crew is a half-dozen strong by default. Treat them as a follower with the *group* tag. All starting values here are subject to change in play.

tags.text: Your crew starts with *group*, a tag granted by your background, plus 2 more of your choice.

options: To bicker, infight, and hold grudges
To hew to tradition and superstition
Risks taken, by you, to help them
Wealth gained for themselves or Stonetop

inventory.text: 3 marks or fewer is a light load; 4-6 is a normal load; 7-9 is a heavy load.

gear.name: Shield
gear.text: +1 armor, +1 Readiness on a 7+ to Defend

individuals.text: When one stands out, give them a name, a tag, and one or more traits.

rules.name: Order Followers
rules.text:
When you *direct them to make a move and they do so,* roll +1 instead of +STAT if any of their tags apply (or +2 if they're also *exceptional*). If no tags apply, roll +0. If any of their tags would get in the way, roll with disadvantage.

When they *are without orders* or they *act on their own initiative*, the GM says what they do and how it goes.

rules.name: Strengthen Your Bond
rules.text:
When you *pay their cost* and you haven't done so recently, they hold +1 Loyalty (max 3).

Spend their Loyalty 1-for-1 to have them:

- Overcome their fear to do as you say
- Resist acting on their instinct/tags/traits
- Do something they don't want to do (as long as it's not abhorrent or suicidal)
